# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because this source is an empirical preprint with real measured results from 567 GitHub pull requests across 157 projects.

## Why

The source clearly meets institute admission criteria as a serious research preprint and as a report of real experimental or observational results. It presents a defined dataset, concrete quantitative findings, explicit comparison against human pull requests, and reported acceptance and modification rates drawn from real-world open-source projects. This is not generic commentary or theorycrafting; it contains direct empirical substance.

## Limits
